p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(b, a / b)

goal: difference_quotient(f, x0, x) * increment = value_increment / increment * increment

p.c: function(x1: lib(rat).Rat) { not x1.is_positive or lib(real.real_base).real_from_rat(x1).is_positive }(lib(rat).Rat.1)

goal: has_derivative_at(f, x0, d) = forall(x1: Real) { x1.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 != x0 and x2.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(f, x0, x2).is_close(d, x1) } } }

p.c: function(x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x5: Real) { x1 = x5 or not x5.is_close(x1, k0) or difference_quotient(x2, x1, x5).is_close(x3, x4) } } } = has_derivative_at(x2, x1, x3) }(x0, f, d)

(forall(x1: Real) { not forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0 != x0 and k0.is_close(x0, x2) and not difference_quotient(f, x0, k0).is_close(d, x1) } } or not has_derivative_at(f, x0, d) or not x1.is_positive })

goal: difference_quotient(f, x0, x) * (x - x0) = f(x) - f(x0)

p.c: function(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1 - x2).abs < x3 = x1.is_close(x2, x3) }(x, x0, delta)

goal: difference_quotient(f, x0, x).abs * (x - x0).abs <= bound * (x - x0).abs
difference_quotient(f, x0, x).abs * (x - x0).abs < bound * delta
